product_data.Features: 65-inch OLED evo panel, 4K 120Hz, Dolby Vision IQ, Dolby Atmos, webOS 23, Game Optimizer with 4x HDMI 2.1 ports, AI Picture Pro

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message:
Hello,

I hope you're doing well. I came across your listing for the LG C3 65-inch OLED TV and I must say, it looks like a fantastic product. I was wondering if there is any room for negotiation on the price. 

Looking forward to hearing from you.

Best regards, 
[Your Name]

conversation_history.speaker: Seller
conversation_history.message:
Hello,

I'm glad to hear you're interested in the LG C3 65-inch OLED TV. It's a top-notch product indeed. While I can't go below the wholesale price of $1,100, I can offer you a special price of $1,600. Let me know if this works for you.

Best regards, 
[Your Name]

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: Thank you for the offer. My budget is $880, so I won't be able to afford the TV at $1,600. If you can reconsider your price, I'd be interested in continuing the discussion. Thank you.

conversation_history.speaker: Seller
conversation_history.message: I understand your budget constraints. While I can't meet your budget of $880, I can offer you a discounted price of $1,000 for the LG C3 65-inch OLED TV. Let me know if this works for you. Thank you.

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: Thank you for the offer. Unfortunately, $1,000 still exceeds my budget. I appreciate your flexibility, but I have to stick to my budget of $880. Thank you for considering.

conversation_history.speaker: Seller
conversation_history.message: I completely understand your budget limitations. I appreciate your interest and your offer. If in the future you find yourself able to increase your budget, feel free to reach out. Thank you for considering.

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: Thank you for your understanding. I will definitely keep your offer in mind for the future. Have a great day!

conversation_history.speaker: Seller
conversation_history.message: Thank you! Have a great day as well!

conversation_history.speaker: Seller
conversation_history.message: You're welcome! If you have any more questions in the future, feel free to ask. Have a great day!

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: I appreciate that, thank you! Have a wonderful day as well!

conversation_history.speaker: Seller
conversation_history.message: Thank you! Have a wonderful day too!
